home.title: Spaxio Assistant
home.tagline: Smarter website chat, better lead capture
home.description: An AI assistant for your business that turns conversations into leads and quote requests.

signup.title: Create an account
signup.description: Enter your details to get started with Spaxio Assistant.
signup.checkEmail: Check your email to confirm your account, then you can sign in.

dashboard.overviewDescription: Your Spaxio Assistant dashboard at a glance.
dashboard.trialEnds: Your free trial ends on {date}. Subscribe to keep your widget live.
dashboard.quickStartDescription: Add the chat widget to your website to start capturing leads.
dashboard.assistantDescription: Your AI assistant is powered by your business settings.
dashboard.behaviorDescription: The assistant uses your company info, services, FAQ, and tone from Settings. Update them to change how the assistant responds.
dashboard.installDescription: Add the chat widget to your website.
dashboard.installTrialNote: Your widget is active during the free trial. After {date}, subscribe in Billing to keep it live.
dashboard.installCodeDescription: Paste this snippet once, just before the closing {bodyTag} tag. The widget loads reliably, stays isolated from your site's CSS, and works on mobile.
dashboard.optionalCustomUrl: Optional: add data-base-url="https://your-backend.com" to the script tag to use a custom backend URL.
dashboard.previewDescription: See how your widget looks on desktop and mobile. Switch views with the buttons below the position dropdown.
dashboard.recentChatsDescription: Download a chat as a file or delete it. Chats are saved when visitors close the widget.
dashboard.quoteRequestsDescription: Structured quote requests from chat. Budget and "Worth it" are based on your base prices in settings.
dashboard.quoteRequestsCardDescription: Customer budget is extracted when they mention it. Set base prices per service in Settings to mark requests below your minimum as "Not worth it".
dashboard.upgradeCtaDescription: Get the full assistant with a 1-week free trial, then $39/month.
dashboard.testCheckoutDescription: Open Stripe Checkout to test the subscription flow (1 week free, then $39/month).
dashboard.dashboardErrorDescription: An error occurred in the dashboard. You can try again or go back.

errors.errorOccurred: An error occurred. You can try again.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or was moved.

metadata.title: Spaxio Assistant
metadata.description: Create vibrant AI chat widgets for your website and turn conversations into leads and quote requests.
